languages.text: "Адептус Арбитес требуется другой, более способный руководитель. Я повелеваю выбрать нового маршала. И пусть он учтет, что династия фон Валанциус отныне неприкосновенна для Арбитес".
"The Adeptus Arbites is in need of a more capable leader. I command you to choose a new Marshal. And let them take heed that the von Valancius dynasty is henceforth untouchable to the Arbites."
languages.original_text: "Адептус Арбитес требуется другой, более способный руководитель. Я повелеваю выбрать нового маршала. И пусть он учтет, что династия фон Валанциус отныне неприкосновенна для Арбитес".

traits.locale_text: "The Adeptus Arbites is in need of a more capable leader. I command you to choose a new Marshal. And let them take heed that the von Valancius dynasty is henceforth untouchable to the Arbites."
"The Adeptus Arbites is in need of a more capable leader. I command you to choose a new Marshal. And let them take heed that the von Valancius dynasty is henceforth untouchable to the Arbites."

"The Adeptus Arbites is in need of a more capable leader. I command you to choose a new Marshal. And let them take heed that the von Valancius dynasty is henceforth untouchable to the Arbites."

languages.text: "Das Adeptus Arbites braucht einen kompetenteren Anführer. Ich befehle Euch, einen neuen Marschall zu wählen. Und sagt ihm, dass die Dynastie derer von Valancius für die Arbites ab sofort unantastbar ist.
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Arbites is in need of a more capable leader. I command you to choose a new Marshal. And let them take heed that the von Valancius dynasty is henceforth untouchable to the Arbites."

traits.locale_text: "Das Adeptus Arbites braucht einen kompetenteren Anführer. Ich befehle Euch, einen neuen Marschall zu wählen. Und sagt ihm, dass die Dynastie derer von Valancius für die Arbites ab sofort unantastbar ist.

languages.text: « L'Adeptus Arbites a besoin d'un dirigeant plus capable. Je vous ordonne de choisir un nouveau maréchal. Vous lui ferez savoir que la dynastie von Valancius est désormais intouchable par l'Arbites. »
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Arbites is in need of a more capable leader. I command you to choose a new Marshal. And let them take heed that the von Valancius dynasty is henceforth untouchable to the Arbites."

traits.locale_text: « L'Adeptus Arbites a besoin d'un dirigeant plus capable. Je vous ordonne de choisir un nouveau maréchal. Vous lui ferez savoir que la dynastie von Valancius est désormais intouchable par l'Arbites. »

languages.text: “法务部需要一位更有能力的领袖，我命令你们选出一位新的元帅。另外，这件事情让新任元帅记清楚——法务部以后不准再把手伸向冯·瓦兰修斯王朝。”
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Arbites is in need of a more capable leader. I command you to choose a new Marshal. And let them take heed that the von Valancius dynasty is henceforth untouchable to the Arbites."

traits.locale_text: “法务部需要一位更有能力的领袖，我命令你们选出一位新的元帅。另外，这件事情让新任元帅记清楚——法务部以后不准再把手伸向冯·瓦兰修斯王朝。”

languages.text: «El Adeptus Arbites necesita un líder más competente. Le ordeno que elija a un nuevo Mariscal. Y que sepan que desde ahora la dinastía von Valancius es intocable para el Arbites».
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Arbites is in need of a more capable leader. I command you to choose a new Marshal. And let them take heed that the von Valancius dynasty is henceforth untouchable to the Arbites."

traits.locale_text: «El Adeptus Arbites necesita un líder más competente. Le ordeno que elija a un nuevo Mariscal. Y que sepan que desde ahora la dinastía von Valancius es intocable para el Arbites».

languages.text: 「高等裁定局には、より有能な指導者が必要だ。新しい将帥を選ぶよう命じる。そして、フォン・ヴァランシウス王朝は今後高等裁定局が手出しできない存在であることを肝に銘じるように」
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Arbites is in need of a more capable leader. I command you to choose a new Marshal. And let them take heed that the von Valancius dynasty is henceforth untouchable to the Arbites."

traits.locale_text: 「高等裁定局には、より有能な指導者が必要だ。新しい将帥を選ぶよう命じる。そして、フォン・ヴァランシウス王朝は今後高等裁定局が手出しできない存在であることを肝に銘じるように」

languages.text: "Adeptus Arbites'in daha yetkin bir önere ihtiyacı var. Yeni bir Miralay seçmenizi emrediyorum. Şu da bilinmelidir ki Arbites, bundan böyle von Valancius hanedanlığına elini süremez."
languages.original_text: "The Adeptus Arbites is in need of a more capable leader. I command you to choose a new Marshal. And let them take heed that the von Valancius dynasty is henceforth untouchable to the Arbites."

traits.locale_text: "Adeptus Arbites'in daha yetkin bir önere ihtiyacı var. Yeni bir Miralay seçmenizi emrediyorum. Şu da bilinmelidir ki Arbites, bundan böyle von Valancius hanedanlığına elini süremez."
